'''Logray's hut''' was the home of the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] shaman [[Logray/Legends|Logray]]. He kept many different magical potions and medicines there. A [[Churi/Legends|churi]] skull was placed in its roof, and its inner walls were adorned with murals of many creatures, real or mythical.

{{Struct-stub}}
